report.summary: Drafted 4 new tweets (#166-169: Geopolitical Relief Rally, AI Rotation Fear thread, Convergence Countdown, ETH L2 Collapse), newsletter v27 Convergence Week section, Discord/TG alert v12, content calendar v39 through Mar 31, and created geopolitical relief rally SVG social card.

sections.title: Social Content Drafted
items: Tweet #166: Geopolitical Relief Rally + Fear Paradox — BTC bounced 5% from $68K on US-Iran pause, contrasted with F&G 8, +$180M ETF inflows, -$420M exchange outflows (Wed Mar 26 3PM ET)

Tweet #167: AI Rotation Fear Thread — 4-part thread on why AI disruption fears are actually bullish for crypto infrastructure; fixed supply, staking yields, DeFi fees can't be compressed (Wed Mar 26 7PM ET)
Tweet #168: Convergence Thursday Countdown — 32-hour countdown to $13.5B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings + uncapped options, all at F&G 8 (Thu Mar 27 12AM ET)
Tweet #169: Ethereum L2 Collapse Stat — L2/L1 DAU ratio dropped from 10.43x to 1.12x YoY, Vitalik questioning L2 playbook (Thu Mar 27 5PM ET)
Newsletter v27: 'The Convergence Week' — subject line options, lead section on triple-catalyst Thursday, new guides spotlight, tools CTA (Mon Mar 31)
Discord/Telegram Alert v12: Evening update with BTC $71,674, F&G 8, ETF/exchange flow data, AI rotation context, convergence countdown (Wed Mar 25 10PM ET)
Content calendar v39: 10 posts across Twitter, Discord/TG, Email scheduled Mar 25-31

items: SVG social card: Geopolitical Relief Rally + Fear Paradox (1200x630, dark theme, dual-bar retail vs institutional divergence, 4 stat boxes: F&G 8 / ETF +$180M / Exchange -$420M / Stablecoins $313B, Convergence Thursday countdown callout)

sections.title: Market Intelligence
items: BTC: $71,299-$71,674 (+5% from $68K low). Geopolitical relief rally on US-Iran military pause.
ETH: $2,158 (+0.79%). L2/L1 DAU ratio collapsed from 10.43x to 1.12x YoY.
F&G: 8 (Extreme Fear). 46-day streak — longest since FTX collapse.
Stablecoins: $313B ATH. Record dry powder. Capital parked, not exiting.
Spot BTC ETF: Net +$180M (BlackRock +$215M, Fidelity +$95M). 7+ day inflow streak.
Exchange netflows: -$420M over 48h. Reduced selling pressure.
AI rotation: Software sector selloff spilling into crypto sentiment. Narrative: AI compresses margins.
Convergence Thursday (Mar 27): $13.5B options expiry + SEC 91 ETF rulings + uncapped ETF options.
degen0x: 840 published pages. 2 pages in queue (tokenized real estate, web3 gaming). Social drafts at v17 (169 tweets cumulative).
